system.description:
Discipline: Dianxue
Skill: Medicine
Type: Normal
Qi: 1

You touch the nine meridian points of a person afflicted with Naga Palm Technique to cure them. On a Success you ward off the effects of the Naga Palm for 6 hours per Rank of Dianxue. On a Total Success you ward off the effects of Naga Palm for 1 day per Rank of Dianxue. For this to work you must have a Qi rating equal to or greater than the original poisoner who delivered the Naga Palm. Cathartic: Used Cathartically this cures Naga Palm Technique on a Successful roll, provided your Qi level is the same or greater than the original poisoner. Failed attempts do 6 Wounds to the target (-1 per Rank of Dianxue). If the original poisoner’s Qi rating is greater than your own, you can still stave off the effects of the Naga Palm for 2 hours per Rank of Dianxue. If you expend 6 Wounds you can extend this to one day per Rank of Dianxue.
system.source: Wandering Heroes of Ogre Gate, Chapter 3: Kung Fu Techniques
system.requirementNotes: You must have a Qi rating equal to or greater than the original poisoner who delivered the Naga Palm.
